/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/qt_dashboard.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/qt_dashboard.dir/qt_dashboard_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qt_dashboard.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qt_dashboard.dir/qt_dashboard_qmltyperegistrations.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qt_dashboard.dir/build/.qt/rcc/qrc_qmake_Dashboard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qt_dashboard.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/qt_dashboard_qmlcache_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qt_dashboard.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/qt_dashboard_Main_qml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qt_dashboard.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/qt_dashboard_GaugeArc_qml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qt_dashboard.dir/build/.qt/rcc/qrc_qt_dashboard_raw_qml_0.cpp.o -o qt_dashboard  /usr/lib/libQt6Quick.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Qml.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2
